en: Lindsay, you will put the headphones on first. Okay. You're right. This is the left one.
ja: リンジー、まずヘッドフォンをつけて。

en: Okay. And then I'll play the music, so it's loud. Oh, my God.
ja: 音楽をかけるから大きくなるよ。
zhTW: 然後我會放音樂讓它很大聲。
vi: Roi toi se bat nhac len that to.

en: This iPod from... Whoa! Right. It's too loud!
vi: Cai iPod nay... O! Dung roi.

en: It's good, right? Ha! Very good. All right.
La Boo Boo doll. La Boo Boo?
La Boo Boo doll. Yes! Wow!

ko: 맞아! 와! 대단해. 와! 너 정말 잘해!
ja: 正解!すごい!よくやった!

en: You're great at this! I'm a good lip reader. You're really good.
ja: 読唇術が上手いんだ。そう!

en: I'm learning something about myself. You're a good lip reader. Yes!
ko: 나 자신에 대해 뭔가 배우고 있어.
ja: 自分について新しいことを知った。
zhTW: 我正在了解自己一些新東西。
vi: Toi dang hoc dieu moi ve ban than.

en: The music is so loud. I know. I only hear it when we play this game,
ja: 知ってる。このゲームの時だけ聞こえる。
zhTW: 我知道。我只有玩這個遊戲時才聽到。
vi: Toi biet. Toi chi nghe thay khi choi tro nay.

en: so I'm like, it's like, I don't even know who's saying. Oh, my gosh. It's so loud.
ja: なんてこった、すごく大きい。

en: Wow. Okay. I take from the top. It's really loud.
ko: 알겠어, 처음부터 다시 해볼게. 정말 시끄러워.
vi: Doi da. Duoc roi, toi lam.

en: Wait. Okay. I'll take it. Pick the top part.
ja: 上の部分を選んで。よし。

en: Okay. Oh, my gosh. Oh, gosh.
ja: よし。ああ、なんてこと。ああ。
vi: Được rồi. Trời ơi. Trời ơi.
